hero_title: Jan uñjkañ aski jakäwi uñjaña.
hero_desc: Jan walinak uñt’ayaña qullqi yatichäwimpit imill wawanakar yanapt’añataki (6 marat 17 marakama).
mision_desc: Mä jark’aqasiñ thakiwa, qullqi tuqit yatichaspa wawanakan chuymap uñjañataki jan walinakax janïr utjkipan.
feature_anie_desc: IA chatbot, munasqayki uykunaruw tukuraki, chuymachañataki uñjañataki.
feature_sos_desc: Mä pusañ thakiwa, jan walinakan utjipan yatichirinakar utjayanataki.
feature_casa_desc: Qullqi imat yatichäwi, imill wawanakax wal jaquntañataki.
eco_section_desc: Janiw ch'amanchat app-llakiti. Mä jark’aqat k’uchu jakäwiwa qullqi thaki kamachitawa.
eco_skeleton_desc: Yatichirinakataki uñjañawa, wawanakan chuymapampi janchipampi kunamasa uk uñt’añataki.
demo_subtitle: Uñt'añäni kunamasa jan walinak imantat uñjt'ayanku
chat_welcome: ¡Kamisaki! Anie satätwa. ¿Kunamasa urumaxa? Akana janiw kuns pächasitati, jark'aqatätwa.
join_desc: Yanapirinakaruw thaqasktan, qullirinakaru, jach'a utanakaru aka thaki comunidades ukanakar apañataki.
footer_desc: Imill wawanak ch'amanchasa yachaympi ukat IA thakimpi.
